get.description:
V2: Get all memberships of an organization.



Args:

    authed_user: The authenticated user in openfga representation.
    Will be extracted from the JWT or service account credential. 

    ctx: The client context of the Glue API. Will be created by the API. 

    organization_id: The organization ID to fetch the memberships for.



Returns:

    list[OrganizationMembershipRead]: A list of organization memberships.



Raises:

    StatusUnauthorized: If the user is not authorized.

    StatusForbidden: If the user is not allowed to access the organization.

    StatusNotFound: If the organization does not exist.

delete.description:
V2: Remove a member from an organization.



Args:

    authed_user: The authenticated user in openfga representation.
    Will be extracted from the JWT or service account credential. 

    ctx: The client context of the Glue API. Will be created by the API. 

    member_id: The user ID of the member to remove.

    organization_id: The organization ID to remove the member from.



Returns:

    StatusOK: The status of the operation.



Raises:

    StatusUnauthorized: If the user is not authorized.

    StatusForbidden: If the user is not allowed to access the organization.

    StatusNotFound: If the organization or the member does not exist.

    StatusInvalidRequest: If the member is the last owner of the organization, the user is not a member of the org
    or the member is nit a user but a service account.

patch.description:
V2: Update a member's permissions within an organization.



Args:

    authed_user: The authenticated user in openfga representation.
    Will be extracted from the JWT or service account credential. 

    ctx: The client context of the Glue API. Will be created by the API. 

    member_id: The ID of the member to update. Can be service account or user.

    organization_id: The organization ID to update the membership for.

    new_permissions: The new permissions to set for the member.



Returns:

    OrganizationMembershipRead: The updated organization membership.

Raises:

    StatusUnauthorized: If the user is not authorized.

    StatusForbidden: If the user is not allowed to access the organization.

    StatusNotFound: If the organization or the member does not exist.

    StatusInvalidRequest: If the user or service account is not a member of the org
